infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: OnStandard uses the camera so you can photograph a meal and get instant nutrition feedback. Photos are analyzed for your log only.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: OnStandard needs photo library access so you can pick an existing meal photo to log and analyze.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: OnStandard can save a meal photo back to your library after you log it.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: OnStandard confirms you arrived at practices, workouts and other commitments your coach scheduled. It checks your location only during a scheduled event window, records only whether you arrived and when, and never stores where you go.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: OnStandard can confirm you arrived at a scheduled commitment without you opening the app. It watches only the specific place your coach scheduled, only during that event window, and stores only whether you arrived and when — never a history of where you go.

plugins.photosPermission: OnStandard lets you pick an existing meal photo to log and analyze.
plugins.cameraPermission: OnStandard uses the camera so you can photograph a meal and get instant nutrition feedback. Photos are analyzed for your log only.
